sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109376" key="u(po/tona" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπότονα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n109376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ropes</tr_> holding a swinging ladder, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:36:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
